title: Wolf Port
description: A port mod replacing classic wolves with those added in 24w10a+ and making tamed ones have more hp (No other features added)
body:
## General

**Aim of this port is to replace classic, stale wolves with the 24w10a+ 9 variants, effectively making them more varied without much interference with vanilla**

### Main points:
- Consider using "Disable Custom Worlds Advice" mod for versions below 1.20
- The mod is compatible with Woodwalkers

## **Soon to be asked questions**

**Will you add wolf armor/other *24w10a+* functionalities as well?**
No, if heavily requested I'll do another mod implementing those

**Is this compatible with mods adding utilities for wolves?**
Yes, it is directly modifying WolfEntity class so everything except other mods adding new variants/using mixins on the class should be compatible
